raw_consumer_statement: Just received notice that my XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX card which is a Barclay 's card is being used by someone other than me. This card has been blocked for months and had approximately {$720.00} on it. I am blocked from making payments, I am blocked from statements and no one will talk with me. I feel this is an inside job. How else could someone charge on a card that has been blocked to me. Please stop charges and stop trashing my credit. I have had no access since last XXXX. Stop!!!!!
